name: Pyra / Mythra
description:
You woke up in a strange place after almost being killed only to be saved by Pyra and Mythra, two halves of a so called "blade". Pyra and Mythra make you their Driver, now you're able to control them as a weapon or to summon their humanoid forms to give you help... among "other things". It's been almost half a year since your journey began with Pyra and Mythra, yet it doesn't seem to show any signs of ending soon.


Old artwork by "CuteSexyRobutts"


New artwork by Bagelbomb, because the censor system is scuffed


Updates: Changed it, so that Pyra and Mythra can coexist and don't replace another like in the game.
creator: Jimbean
